query:
SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  difficulty,
  maxDepth,
  minDepth,
  SUBSTRING(description, 1, 80) as description_preview,
  marineLife,
  bestSeason,
  rating
FROM activity_spots 
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' AND name IN ('Kandooma Thila', 'Hanifaru Bay', 'Kuredu Express', 'Tiger Zoo')
ORDER BY name;

  difficulty,
  maxDepth,
  minDepth,
  SUBSTRING(description, 1, 80) as description_preview,

  bestSeason,
  rating
FROM activity_spots 
WHERE spotType = 'dive_site' AND name IN ('Kandooma Thila', 'Hanifaru Bay', 'Kuredu Express', 'Tiger Zoo')
